channel.title: Automobiles in India: Cars, Bikes, Trucks, Buses

item.title: Auto shows, Auto Shows on TV
item.description: View Auto shows and list of auto shows around the world. Auto shows limelight the newly launched cars, bikes, themes etc. Auto shows on TV are popular with detailed review of vehicle. Find Auto shows calendar here

item.title: 2012 Auto events in India
item.description: Know about the upcoming auto events in India that are going to take India to new heights in the global automobile market in 2012.

item.title: Auto Fair
item.description: Auto Fair is going to be held in Guwahati, Assam from September 20 to 23, 2012. It is a key event for the automobile and automation sector in Eastern India. Know more about fair details.

item.title: Automotive Engineering Show in Pune
item.description: In 2012 Automotive Engineering Show will take place on April 26, 2012 in Pune. This is a major event for automobile technology manufacturers in India.

item.title: Automotive Testing Expo India 2012, Automotive Expo 2012
item.description: Automotive testing expo India 2012 is going to be held on 6th - 8th March in Chennai trade and convention centre. Major attraction of Automotive Expo 2012 is ATS technology forum.

item.title: China Products Mumbai India Exhibition
item.description: China Products Mumbai India Exhibition is scheduled to take place from December 20-22, 2012. The venue is Bombay Exhibition Centre, Mumbai.

item.title: Auto Expo
item.description: Know about India Auto Expo going to be held in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. India Auto Expo event is the biggest and most attractive business event for Indian automobile sector.

item.title: Fastener Convention
item.description: Fastener Convention will take place in Ahmedabad, the car manufacturing and automotive engineering hub of Gujarat. Get more details about Fastener Convention.

item.title: International Machine Tools and Auto Components Exhibition, ACMEE 2012
item.description: ACMEE 2012 or International Machine Tools and Auto Components Exhibition will take place on June 14, 2012 in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Know the highlights of ACMEE.

item.title: Indian Machine Tool and Automation Expo in Coimbatore
item.description: Indian Machine Tool and Automation Expo Coimbatore is going to be a major exhibition for automation product and machine tool manufacturers to showcase their products. Get the details.

item.title: India Machine Tools and Automation Expo in New Delhi
item.description: Know about India Machine Tools and Automation Expo New Delhi going to be held on 16th-18th March 2012 at Talkatora Stadium, New Delhi.

item.title: Motorsports in India, Car Racing Leagues
item.description: View Motorsports in India, Motorsports games, Motorsports events, Motorsports engineering along with Motorsports news. Get along with list of Motorsports events in India and places where Car Racing leagues held.

item.title: My Business India Show
item.description: My Business India Show will start on May 11, 2012 and conclude on May 14, 2012. It is one of the major business shows to be held in Vapi, Gujarat. Know about the programs list.

item.title: Partmart & Autocare
item.description: Partmart & Autocare will be held in New Delhi. The venue is Pragati Maidan and it will continue for three days. Get more details about Partmart & Autocare.

item.title: India Rubber Expo
item.description: India Rubber Expo is going to be a landmark event for the rubber manufacturers in India. It will be held in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Know more about India Rubber Expo.

item.title: Automobile World Show
item.description: Automobile World Show will showcase the growth trends of the automobile industry in Gujarat. Get the details of Automobile World Show.

item.title: Auto Expo 2012 in Delhi, Cars in Auto Expo
item.description: Know about Auto Expo 2012 in Delhi events and schedule. You can find cars of all models and brands in Auto Expo 2012 going to be held on Pragati Maidan.

item.title: Auto Expo Delhi 2012, Delhi Auto-Expo 2012
item.description: Know about Auto Expo event 2012 in Delhi. Auto Expo is biennial trade fair of automobiles and component manufacturers organized at Pragati Maidan in New Delhi.

item.title: Buying Used Cars, Used Car Market
item.description: The most credible answer is that used cars are cheap. So, be it your first car or the dream vehicle that you always wanted to buy, but had little money, the solution is to hunt out a used one. With large number of new models flooding the market every year, buying used car has never been this good.
